summary: Phase A/B/C engagement layer verified end-to-end. Backend: 45/45 pytest pass (1 skipped due to harmless race where bot won before user could dab full row). New endpoints all green: GET/POST /api/missions, GET/POST /api/battle-pass (+ activate-premium), GET/POST /api/collection, GET /api/streak + upgraded /api/daily-reward/claim (now returns streak_days & next_reward), GET /api/event/current, POST /api/computer-match with num_cards=2 returning user_cards[], POST /api/computer-match/dab (stats.dabs/speed_dabs increment), POST /api/computer-match/use-powerup (reveal returns peek[]), POST /api/computer-match/claim-bingo with dabbed_numbers validation (rejects uncalled numbers & non-line dabs). Frontend (375x667): login -> guest -> home renders 2 rows of quick actions (Missions, Streak, Battle Pass, Collection + Spin/Tournaments/Friends/Shop); /missions shows 3 daily missions with progress bars + Go buttons; /battle-pass shows Season 1 Neon Blast hero + XP bar + 50 tier rows with FREE+PREMIUM columns + Unlock Premium ₹299 CTA; /collections shows Neon Nights set with 12 balls (Common/Rare/Epic rarity badges) + 0/12 owned progress; /streak shows 7-day calendar 50-500 BC + Claim Day 1 Reward; /game in computer mode shows How-to-Play overlay first time, 2 cards swipeable (Card 1/2, Card 2/2), recent-calls strip, power-up bar (Dauber/Reveal/2x with x2/x2/x1 counts), 'Mark a line' disabled Bingo button, Current Call banner with 'Tap X on your card — fast for bonus XP!' prompt. Backfill _ensure_extras works for existing users. All new screens are registered in _layout.tsx.

minor.issue: Use query-string params instead of JSON body; inconsistent with /missions/claim and /battle-pass/claim which take JSON. Cosmetic — all work correctly.

On invalid claim (uncalled number OR no line), server sets match.status=finished with winner=bot. This is correctly punitive per game design, but client-side pre-validation in game.tsx should prevent reaching here — verify that is in place.

issues: Pre-existing deprecated RN-web style warnings: shadow*, textShadow*, Image style.resizeMode. Non-blocking, inherited from iteration 1.

action_items: (Minor naming) Review request referred to testIDs 'quick-battle-pass', 'powerup-dauber/reveal/double'. Actual implementation uses 'quick-bp', 'power-dauber', 'power-reveal', 'power-double'. Tests pass either way — consider standardising docs or renaming for consistency.

(Optional) Standardise query-string vs JSON-body endpoints: /collection/claim, /battle-pass/activate-premium, /computer-match/use-powerup, /spin-wheel/spin, /daily-reward/claim, /tournament/register all still use query params.
(Optional) Add game.tsx unit-level screenshot check with a line fully dabbed to end-to-end verify valid-claim path (hard to automate due to RNG calling order).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now ~980 lines. Starting to exceed 700-line recommendation — consider splitting into routers/missions.py, routers/battle_pass.py, routers/matches.py in next iteration.
_ensure_extras migration is idempotent and runs on every user fetch — good backwards compatibility.
check_line() + dabbed_numbers validation correctly enforces 'user only gets credit for numbers they actually dabbed' — core anti-cheat for the new manual-dab mechanic.
Battle-pass premium activation is MOCKED (no real Razorpay gate) — flagged in request, acceptable for now.
Power-up 'double' stores double_reward flag on match doc and is applied at claim time — clean.
Live event logic (/api/event/current) uses UTC; Power Hour 19-20 UTC may not hit US/India prime-time — consider per-region event windows when scaling.
Missions are random-sampled per day via _today_missions which overwrites any existing same-day missions only when missions_date differs — good determinism.
Streak wraps at day 8 back to day 1 — wrap logic is correct but might be worth a comment in code.

success_rate.frontend: 100% smoke — all 4 new screens load, game shows how-to + 2 cards + power-up bar + disabled Bingo btn

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_eng_<pid> guest user (in addition to iteration 1's TEST_device_<pid> and TEST_device2_<pid>). Used for all new Phase A/B/C tests. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To rerun: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. NEW file test_engagement_phases.py covers every new endpoint. Fixture eng_user scoped module. Claim-bingo-valid-line test is inherently racy (bot may claim first on easy) — pytest.skip used. Key testIDs on new screens: home quick actions use 'quick-missions','quick-streak','quick-bp','quick-collection' (NOTE: 'quick-bp' NOT 'quick-battle-pass'). Game screen: 'game-screen','howto-close-btn','close-game-btn','help-btn','recent-numbers-strip','bingo-board-{ci}','bingo-cell-{ci}-{r}-{c}','power-dauber','power-reveal','power-double' (NOT 'powerup-*'),'claim-bingo-btn','chat-overlay-btn'. Guest login flow: /login -> tap [data-testid=guest-login-btn] -> redirects to home at /. Battle pass / Collection / Streak screens auto-load from AsyncStorage user_id; direct URL visits without prior login go blank (expected).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs. Initial false-negative on direct URL access to /missions/battle-pass/etc was due to navigating before logging in (screens need user_id from AsyncStorage). After performing guest login, all screens load correctly.
